message:
Add webhook notification system for external alerting integrations

Feature Overview:
Implement webhook notifications alongside the existing desktop notifications,
enabling integration with Slack, PagerDuty, Discord, or custom alert systems.
This is critical for teams where human reviewers may not be at their terminals.

New Types and Constants:
- WebhookEvent enum: critical_request_pending, dangerous_request_pending,
  request_timeout, request_escalated
- WebhookPayload struct with fields: event, request_id, command, tier,
  requestor, timestamp, project
- WebhookNotifier interface for testability
- DefaultWebhookNotifier implementation using http.Client with 10s timeout
- WebhookTimeout constant (10 seconds)

NotificationManager Enhancements:
- Add webhook field (WebhookNotifier interface) to NotificationManager struct
- Initialize webhook notifier in NewNotificationManager when config.WebhookURL
  is set
- Add WithWebhook() method for dependency injection in tests
- Add SendWebhook() public method for direct webhook calls (e.g., on timeout
  or escalation events)

Check() Method Improvements:
- Extend to notify on both CRITICAL and DANGEROUS tier requests (previously
  only CRITICAL triggered desktop notifications)
- Desktop notifications still only fire for CRITICAL tier (most urgent)
- Webhook notifications fire for both CRITICAL and DANGEROUS tiers
- Use proper context.WithTimeout for webhook calls to prevent blocking
- Add structured logging for webhook success/failure with request_id and event

Webhook Payload Format:
POST to configured URL with Content-Type: application/json, User-Agent:
SLB-Webhook/1.0. Example payload:
{
  "event": "critical_request_pending",
  "request_id": "req-abc123",
  "command": "kubectl delete node worker-3",
  "tier": "CRITICAL",
  "requestor": "GreenLake",
  "timestamp": "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z",
  "project": "/data/projects/infrastructure"
}

Configuration:
Enable via config.toml:
  [notifications]
  webhook_url = "https://hooks.slack.com/..."

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
